execution_recommendation.reason: Requires parallel development of PHP plugin class and TypeScript MCP tools, followed by registration + test verification. Ralph Loop attended execution recommended.

tasks.title: Implement Voxel detection in PHP
tasks.description: Create plugin/includes/Api/Voxel.php with detect, post-types, taxonomies, product-types, settings, health endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Voxel.php implements BaseController with 6+ REST routes
detect_voxel returns active, version, elementor_integration, theme_active
Post types endpoint returns label, slug, field count
Product types endpoint returns pricing models
Settings endpoint returns pagination, map provider, currency
Health endpoint checks REST API, tables, memory

tasks.title: Implement Voxel MCP tools in TypeScript
tasks.description: Create mcp-server/src/tools/voxel.ts with 7 tool definitions matching Voxel.php endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: 7 tools defined: detect_voxel, list_voxel_post_types, get_voxel_post_type, list_voxel_taxonomies, get_voxel_product_types, get_voxel_settings, voxel_health_check
All tools use Free tier governance

tasks.title: Register Voxel tools in product-tiers.ts
tasks.description: Register all 7 Voxel tools in the Free tier tool manifest.
acceptanceCriteria: All Voxel tools appear in product-tiers.ts under free tier
Route registration in Router.php includes Voxel namespace

tasks.title: Write tests for Voxel adapter
tasks.description: Write PHP unit tests for Voxel.php endpoints and TypeScript tests for voxel.ts tools.
acceptanceCriteria: PHP tests cover all 6+ endpoints with mock Voxel data
TypeScript tests verify tool definitions and parameter validation
